title: duchesnea major
intro: Duchesnea major, also known as the yellow clover or yellow trefoil, is a perennial herbaceous plant in the rose family, native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, with potential medicinal uses including treating wounds, fever, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Duchesnea major include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy in natural medicine. Duchesnea major can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, with some herbalists also using it in poultices and salves to aid in wound healing and skin conditions.
